decisions.rationale: Observation already correctly resolves to base_record_id 'project_116th-st-bus-pedestrian-priority'. The registry card has identical project name, matching source_id (116_st_morningside_ave_pleasant_ave_cb11_jun2025), consistent Manhattan borough, and the observation's record_id appears as an alias. Closest match IS own base_record_id — per rules, decision is 'new' (already resolved). Other 116th-Street records (study, review) are distinct phases, not this active bus/pedestrian priority project.
